column1: Incorporated in 2000,Tejas Networks Ltd designs and manufactures wireline and wireless networking products, with a focus on technology, innovation  and  R&D.  TNL carrier-class  products  are  used  by  telecom  service  providers,  utilities,  governments,  and  defence networks in 75+ countries.  Company  is  currently  a  part  of  Panatone  Finvest  Limited  (a  subsidiary  of  Tata  Sons  Private Limited). [1]
